text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The holiday season is at its peak. Although the
mood throughout campus is festive, Air Shakur
seems unaffected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is just around the corner, so
she's putting the final touches on Parcae's model.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even with Air Shakur's fate overturned, Parcae
continues to be an important partner to her. I'll
confirm the confirm the details with her later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I probably still haven't been able to become the
idea partner for Air Shakur, but I've never given
up trying.
choice_data_list: (At least I know what she likes.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as it's a special occasion, I pick up a small
gift for her in hopes of conveying the feelings I
usually can't.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It's mostly sorted.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I think all that's left is for me give you my report.
choice_data_list:
Sorry for making you wait. I had to run a quick
errand.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's fine, but let's get started. We don't have time
to waste.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Essentially, Manhattan Cafe is the one to watch
out for.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I can't let the race develop favorably for her. I'll
pull away on the final stretch.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
They're obviously a threat, but not as much as
before.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Everyone's gotta pass the torch at some point.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's what they say. Actually, I thought it
was going to skip a generation...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I never planned to compete in the Arima Kinen
this year.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I ran it once before... and lost.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That was... Well, I thought that was game over for
me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And after that...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But now, I come out on top in every simulation no
matter what conditions I set.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I was just thinking.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Why was Parcae trying to lead me down such a
hard road?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Why was it trying to lay that fate on me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her question is sincere, but there's no clear
answer. Though, one thing comes to my mind...
choice_data_list:
They say gods don't dish out trials that can't be
overcome.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I've heard as much.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't they also say that they always provide a
way out or something?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Real funny. So what, the gods overrated me?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What a joke. If that's divine favor, they can keep
it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'll show them what I'm made of on the greatest
and most terrible stage.
choice_data_list: And what if they still favor you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'll laugh in their stupid faces and brush them
aside. As many times as I need to.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Well?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Aren't you going take your shot?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You went out earlier, right? Considering what day
it is, I figure you were shopping.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Or can I leave?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears that she's seen right through me.
However...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh?
choice_data_list:
I thought about it too much and ended up not
knowing what to do.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You're so lame.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: So that's how it is, huh? Makes no sense at all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I'm not sure how to respond, but Air Shakur is
laughing so I decide to just let it slide.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur lets out a big laugh. Knowing how she
is now, I know her laughter is genuine.
choice_data_list: I wonder what Parcae thinks of the current you.
I wonder what Parcae thinks of the current you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hah. Parcae's just a program.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What about me?
choice_data_list:
Do you have anything you want to say to
Parcae?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What the hell are you babbling about? Of course
not.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Parcae and Air Shakur are bound by some sort of
special connection. At least, it feels that way to
me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Even now, I still don't think Parcae was wrong.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: We're just different. It's... hard to explain.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If I really was fated to lose by seven centimeters
and then fail in my senior year, there was no way I
was going to just sit back and accept it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: But, if this is the result of sticking to your guns... If I can review the equation and be confident there were no mistakes, then that is the solution.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So, if I were able to tell Parcae something, it
would be...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Right now, there's not a single person who doesn't
know my name. And not only that...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: They'll never forget it either.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And I'll prove it at the Arima Kinen. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, our peaceful evening draws to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After much deliberation, I opted to get her
something she could use, so I picked out a few
cans of her favorite coffee.
choice_data_list:
(She probably won't want them anyway. I guess
it's fine.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking that, I go to put the coffee away, only
to find a single piece of candy left in their place.
